title: Gradient Fade Reveal
description: Create an image that fades from fully visible to transparent using a linear gradient mask.
hint: Use mask-image with linear-gradient(from transparent to black).

title: Radial Spotlight Reveal
description: Create a spotlight effect that reveals a colored image beneath a grayscale version using radial gradient masking.
hint: Stack two images on top of each other, mask the top one with a radial gradient that follows the mouse.

title: SVG Shape Mask Gallery
description: Build an image gallery where each image is masked into a different SVG shape (circle, triangle, star, heart).
hint: Create inline SVG <mask> elements and reference them with mask: url(#shapeMask).
criteria: Images masked to fit each shape
starter:
<svg><defs><mask id="circle"><circle cx="50%" cy="50%" r="45%" fill="white"/></mask></defs></svg>
<style>
  .circle-img { mask: url(#circle); }
</style>

title: Animated Page Reveal
description: Create an animated page loading effect where content is revealed using a growing circle mask.
hint: Animate the mask-size or use a CSS animation with a radial gradient mask that expands.
